articles.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is recovering from severe facial and leg injuries caused by an airstrike that killed his father. Despite his disfigurement, he remains mentally sharp and participates in decision-making through audio conferencing.

articles.title: How US troops in Kuwait were sitting ducks in deadly Iran attack
articles.description: How US troops in Kuwait were sitting ducks in deadly Iran attack

articles.title: Voters' lists in 12 States, Union Territories shrink by over 6 crore post SIR
articles.description: The combined voters' list of nine States and three Union territories has shrunk following the completion of the SIR

articles.title: Russia and Ukraine set to begin Easter truce
articles.description: The temporary ceasefire came as US-led talks on ending the four-year-old conflict have been derailed by the Middle East war. The two sides also held a ceasefire for the Orthodox Easter last year.

articles.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
articles.description: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.

articles.title: Elections 2026 LIVE: Modi to address 3 rallies in Bengal; TMC says BJP wants to 'erase India's diversity'
articles.description: Elections 2026 LIVE: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to address three rallies in poll-bound West Bengal on Saturday. Meanwhile, the ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC) criticised the BJP’s plan to introduce the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) in Bengal, saying it would weaken India’s diversity.

articles.title: 4.7 magnitude earthquake jolts Maharashtra’s Hingoli district, no casualties
articles.description: Tremors were also felt in neighbouring Nanded city and rural areas, talukas of Ardhapur, Hadgaon, and Himayatnagar, and in parts of Parbhani district, officials said

articles.title: Teams led by CSIR women scientists report advances in research on depression mechanisms in females
articles.description: A group of scientists at Hyderabad’s CSIR-IICT are leading transformative research in decoding female-specific depression mechanisms. Their work not only addresses critical scientific gaps but also advances inclusive healthcare solutions, highlighting the growing impact of women in India’s research ecosystem

dailyNews.description: Designs for the President Donald Trump-touted 250-foot Triumphal Arch near Arlington National Cemetery were revealed ahead of next week's Commission of Fine Arts vote.

dailyNews.title: World Leaders Push to Save Iran Talks Amid Israel’s Attacks in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s cease-fire with Iran appears at risk as Vice President JD Vance heads to Pakistan for discussions with Iranian officials.

dailyNews.title: Iran Unable to Find Mines It Planted in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Says
dailyNews.description: The lost mines have prevented Iran from quickly complying with President Trump’s demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Racing to Redefine ‘America First’ in a Time of War
dailyNews.description: Washington has been debating the thrust of Mr. Trump’s foreign policy for more than a decade, with the only consensus being that “America First” means whatever the president says it does.

dailyNews.title: Officials Release Design for 250-Foot Arch in Washington, as Trump Seeks Another Imprint
dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says First Lady ‘Had a Right’ to Talk About Epstein
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Trump Moves Top Aide James Blair to Political Operation Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: Mr. Blair will “lead the charge from the outside,” the president said on social media. The move comes as Republicans are bracing for a potentially difficult November election.

dailyNews.title: A Republican Strategist Explains What’s Going On With the Party
dailyNews.description: Without Trump on the midterms ballot, how will his party fare?

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes covering executive office building's stone facade with white paint
dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: Planned "Arc de Trump" would be over twice as high as Lincoln Memorial
dailyNews.description: Plans submitted by the Interior Department show the triumphal arch would be 250 feet tall, the tallest triumphal arch in the world.
